Name: St. Andrew's vs. Beaufort Academy
Summary: Beaufort Academy defeated St. Andrew's 8-2 in tennis. Paige Edwards won a singles match for St. Andrew's.

LineMatches.Notes: The article identifies Paige Edwards as a singles winner but does not publish the line number, opponent name, or set score.

Source: SavannahNow Sports Briefs, Oct. 4, 2012

Name: 2017 All-Greater Savannah Boys Tennis
Summary: Jack Wylly was named first-team All-Greater Savannah boys tennis after finishing the season with a 7-1 record.
Source: SavannahNow 2017 All-Greater Savannah Boys Tennis Team, May 9, 2017

Name: 2018 All-Greater Savannah Boys Tennis
Summary: Jack Wylly was named first-team All-Greater Savannah boys tennis after finishing the season with a 10-2 record for St. Andrew's.
Source: SavannahNow 2018 All-Greater Savannah Boys Tennis Team, May 17, 2018

Name: 2019 GISA State Tennis Tournament - Boys
Summary: Jack Wylly won the GISA individual state title, and the St. Andrew's boys team finished runner-up in the GISA team state tournament.

Honors.Title: Savannah Morning News Boys Tennis Player of the Year

Source: SavannahNow Boys Tennis Player of the Year article, May 8, 2019
